false_positives_excluded.decision_basis: Option C authorized by orchestrator: validator_mandate m3_active_subcmd_preservation_mandatory (hard precondition) outranks M1 enumeration (input data). Preserving 3 currently-passing tests that invoke active Subcommand variants.

additional_cleanup.rationale: validator_mandate (no orphan helper imports per cargo clippy -D warnings) required removal of test-only helpers, type definitions, and use-imports left dead by mass deletion. All cleanups are in test files only; no production code touched.

items.removed: fn create_complex_test_project (orphan helper, only used by deleted CFG/DFG/SSA tests)
fn create_typed_project (orphan helper, only used by deleted bounds tests)
mod bounds_command (now-empty after all bounds tests deleted) + const PYTHON_BOUNDS_ANALYSIS

mod behavioral_command (now-empty) + const PYTHON_IMPURE_FUNCTIONS + const PYTHON_BEHAVIORAL + behavioral types (Precondition, Postcondition, ExceptionInfo, SideEffect, FunctionBehavior, BehavioralReport) + enums (DocstringStyle, EffectType, ConditionSource)
mod gvn_multilang + mod bounds_multilang + mod behavioral_multilang (all now-empty)

mod equivalence_command + mod diff_impact_command (now-empty) + Diff Impact types (ChangedFunction, DiffImpactSummary, DiffImpactReport) + Equivalence/GVN types (ExpressionRef, GVNEquivalence, Redundancy, GVNSummary, GVNReport) + const PYTHON_EQUIVALENCE_SAMPLE

cargo_test.drop_variance_explanation: Drop = 153 vs expected 147 (147 Cat-A failing tests in original M1 RED, before excluding the 3 false-positives — none of which were failing). Net deletion of 162 entries removed all 147 failing Cat-A tests + 15 of 18 Cat-A #[ignore]'d tests (3 of 18 were the false-positives). Variance of +6 reflects test outcomes shifted by removed shared types/helpers. Within ±20 tolerance per IF BLOCKED guidance.

regressed_tests_M1_pass_to_M3_fail.name: bugbot_check_staged_flag_changes_detection_method
regressed_tests_M1_pass_to_M3_fail.regression_root_cause: ENVIRONMENTAL — test runs `bugbot check --staged .` against the host's CURRENT git staged state. M3's 162 staged deletions create a large diff that bugbot times out on (60+ seconds, panics at 'should exit 0'). Test assertion is environment-dependent on `git diff --cached` output size. Will pass again POST-COMMIT when the staged diff becomes commit history. Not a code regression.
regressed_tests_M1_pass_to_M3_fail.no_helper_orphan_link: verified — bugbot_tests.rs has no dependency on any deleted helper, mod, type, or constant

verification.post_commit_smoke_test_required: re-run `cargo test --release --features semantic --test bugbot_tests bugbot_check_staged_flag_changes_detection_method` after commit to confirm environmental regression resolves

compliance.M1_amendment_purpose: consistency: M1 enumeration now reflects the 162 entries actually deleted, with false_positives_excluded field documenting the 3 preserved tests
